order.orderSuccessPageAlertDescription1: Thank you for ordering from Cartoon Gifts! Your order is on its way to us - you will receive a confirmation email with the order details.
order.orderSuccessPageAlertDescription2: If you have problems or want to contact us please email us at :
order.orderFailurePageAlertTitle: It looks like something did not go as planned!
order.orderFailurePageAlertDescription: Your payment might have failed or you have canceled your order - if this is not the case, please contact us!

order-offer.toastDescription: Enjoy our summer sale with a discount from us. It will be automatically applied on checkout!

index-description: Turn your photos into stunning, handmade cartoon portraits — the perfect personalised gift for birthdays, anniversaries, weddings and any occasion. Order online, fast worldwide delivery.
index-keywords: cartoon gifts, personalised cartoon portrait, custom cartoon illustration, handmade cartoon art, unique personalised gifts, birthday cartoon, wedding gift cartoon, cartoon portrait Bulgaria
pricing-description: Affordable pricing for custom cartoon portraits. Choose from digital or physical options with various sizes and delivery methods. High-quality, personalized artwork at competitive prices.
contact-description: Get in touch with Cartoon Gifts. We're here to answer your questions about custom cartoon portraits, orders, and our services. Contact us via email or social media.
gallery-description: Browse our gallery of custom cartoon portraits. See examples of our handmade, personalized illustrations for various occasions and styles.
order-description: Upload your photo and order a 100% handmade cartoon portrait. Choose your size, delivery type and canvas option. Your unique illustration will be ready in days — shipped worldwide.
order-keywords: order custom cartoon portrait, buy personalised cartoon, handmade cartoon gift, custom illustration order, cartoon portrait online, personalised cartoon art
